label: Monorepo — enthusiast
summary: Several apps and packages in one repo. Match domain/application/presentation/persistence folder names in any package.

layerDescriptions.DomainModel: Shared business types in packages — no I/O.
layerDescriptions.ApplicationOrchestration: Shared use cases and services across apps.
layerDescriptions.PersistenceAdapters: Per-app or shared adapters for storage and APIs.
